data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::NotepadTextDashed;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        NotepadTextDashed { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
notebook, notes, pages, paper, stationery, diary, journal, writing, write, written, draft, template, lines

## Categories
text, social

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/notepad-text-dashed)
